introSection: Crazy Mouse was a steel roller coaster located at Beijing Shijingshan Amusement Park in Shijingshan, Beijing, China. It was closed at some point from 2010 to 2012. It was replaced by a very similar unit in 2015.
fullText:
Crazy Mouse was a steel roller coaster located at Beijing Shijingshan Amusement Park in Shijingshan, Beijing, China. It was closed at some point from 2010 to 2012. It was replaced by a very similar unit in 2015.

Orange track and white supports.
